subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi of the world! Through the breezes of the Ancient Lord's bounty, thou hast been adorned with the flowers of divine knowledge and the fruits of realities. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی عالم از نسایم عنایت مالک قدم باوراد معارف و اثمار حقایق مزین گشته مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
